name: Baseline — V-Mart Diwali Saturday
description: What the store actually does today. The 'before' configuration. Sourced from the brief's baseline policy bullets and Manit's clarifications (staff = 18, 1 fixed billing, trial unmanned).

compliance.notes: No agent-decision overrides. All knobs are environmental.

lever_1_billing.notes: Manager observes queue every 25-30 min and opens counters reactively. By the time he calls, the queue is already 15-20 deep — damage already done.

lever_2_floor_staffing.notes: Per the brief: 'Staff allocations are fixed at store open and don't change through the 12-hour day.' A staff member assigned to infants at 10am is still in infants at 8pm even if infants is empty.

lever_3_trial_rooms.notes: Per the brief: 'One attendant manages the entire women's bank. No item limit per entry.' Manit's clarification: in baseline T01 (trial-room attendant by role) is NOT stationed — they do floor relief. So no attendant, no item cap. Items-in-cubicle limit (4) is weakly enforced — staff only intervene if visibly egregious.

power_wall.festive_concentration_note: Mannequins are dressed in ethnic festive (saree, kurta) but racks behind carry mixed SKUs — not exclusively festive. ~50% festive, ~50% non-festive.

promo_islands.content_skus_note: Center-aisle B2G1 tables stock excess inventory from earlier in the season — clearance lehengas, last-season kurtis. Not curated impulse items.

impulse_fixture_near_billing.notes: Bangles, earrings, makeup, sunglasses near checkout. Assortment is static, not refreshed during the day.

campaign.slogan: Diwali Dhamaka Flat 30% off + Buy 2 Get 1 Free on ethnic wear
campaign.notes: One campaign for everyone — migrant Hindi-belt shoppers, local Kannadigas, young women, family groups all see the same offer. No phone/loyalty capture. No personalized offers.

lever_5_cross_merch_and_replenishment.footwear_placement_note: Footwear is on the opposite side of the store from apparel. A shopper who buys a saree must cross the store to find matching juttis or heels. Most don't bother — attach rate stays low.

department_blocking.note: Departments are blocked. An outfit-building shopper traverses three zones.

lever_5_cross_merch_and_replenishment.stockout_response_note: Staff check the stockroom only if a customer specifically asks. No proactive replenishment based on visible fixture gaps. L/XL in women's ethnic stocks out first at peak and stays out until 16:00 top-up.

do_not_touch.trial_probability_per_profile: fixed in store/engine.js TRIAL_PROB (mom 0.55, young 0.78, family 0.45, male 0.18, browser 0.04)
do_not_touch.arrival_curve: fixed in data/agents.json (per-agent arrival_minute, drawn from per-profile chi-square)
do_not_touch.purchase_probability_post_trial: fixed in engine (50-60% baseline per brief)
do_not_touch.rng_seed: fixed — same seed across baseline and optimized runs for honest A/B

expected_baseline_kpis_1000_agents.source: Brief's expected baseline outcome (pp. 11), scaled from 6,500-8,000 footfall down to 1,000 (~7×).
